hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today brings new opportunities, but you must seize them quickly.
aries.love: A spark of romance can lighten your day; be open to new connections.
aries.career: Ambition fuels your drive; take charge of your projects.

taurus.general: Stability is your ally; trust your instincts.
taurus.love: Deepening relationships may offer comfort and contentment.
taurus.career: Focus on long-term goals; your hard work will soon pay off.

gemini.general: Communication is key today; express your thoughts clearly.
gemini.love: An old flame may reappear; choose wisely whether to reignite.
gemini.career: Collaboration with others can lead to exciting new ideas.

cancer.general: Emotions run deep; seek balance in your daily activities.
cancer.love: Show vulnerability to your partner; it can draw you closer.
cancer.career: Your nurturing side will be appreciated in team settings today.

leo.general: Your charisma shines bright; others are drawn to your energy.
leo.love: A surprise gesture can rekindle passion in your relationship.
leo.career: Take the lead in group discussions; your ideas are valuable.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will serve you well today; be thorough.
virgo.love: A practical approach to love may help resolve recent issues.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will be in high demand; embrace them.

libra.general: Seek harmony in your surroundings; beauty matters today.
libra.love: A conversation will deepen your connection with a loved one.
libra.career: Negotiations will go smoothly; be diplomatic.

scorpio.general: Intensity characterizes your day; channel it wisely.
scorpio.love: Passion runs high; embrace the thrill of romance.
scorpio.career: Trust your instincts; they will guide you through challenges.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; seek experiences that broaden your horizons.
sagittarius.love: A spontaneous outing could reignite your passion.
sagittarius.career: Embrace change; it may lead to unexpected growth in your career.

capricorn.general: Discipline will help you achieve your goals today.
capricorn.love: Show your softer side; it can strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: Setting clear objectives will ensure progress.

aquarius.general: Innovation thrives today; think outside the box.
aquarius.love: Embrace new experiences with your partner to deepen your connection.
aquarius.career: Networking can lead to exciting new opportunities.

pisces.general: Dreams take center stage; pay attention to your intuition.
pisces.love: Artistic expressions can enhance your romantic life.
pisces.career: Your creativity will shine brightly; let it guide your projects.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard.
professional.author: Tim Notke

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Life is 10% what happens to us and 90% how we react to it.
motivation.author: Charles R. Swindoll

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: It is the courage to continue that counts.
motivation.author: Winston S. Churchill

captions.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
captions.author: Wayne Gretzky

captions.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
captions.author: Albert Schweitzer

captions.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
captions.author: Norman Vaughan

captions.text: It always seems impossible until it’s done.
captions.author: Nelson Mandela

captions.text: Do what you can with all you have, wherever you are.
captions.author: Theodore Roosevelt

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great myth of our times is that technology is communication.
tech.author: Libby Larsen

tech.text: Technology is not just a tool; it can give learners a voice that they may not have had before.
tech.author: George Couros

tech.text: The real danger is not that computers will begin to think like men, but that men will begin to think like computers.
tech.author: Sydney J. Harris

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is equivalent to magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: Laughter is timeless, imagination has no age, and dreams are forever.
fun.author: Walt Disney

fun.text: The most wasted of days is one without laughter.
fun.author: E.E. Cummings

fun.text: Life is too important to be taken seriously.
fun.author: Oscar Wilde

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Why fit in when you were born to stand out?
fun.author: Dr. Seuss

fun.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
fun.author: Albert Einstein

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: The greatest act of faith is when a man identifies himself as a servant of God.
faith.author: Rick Warren

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: If you have faith as small as a mustard seed, you can say to this mountain, 'Move from here to there,' and it will move.
faith.author: The Bible

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The growth and development of people is the highest calling of leadership.
wisdom.author: Harvey S. Firestone

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: Thomas Carlyle

wisdom.text: A wise person should have money in their head, but not in their heart.
wisdom.author: Jonathan Swift

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates
